comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.

comment_text: This is a full roof replacement. This is ASHLEY Ferguson‘s father. The front section of the house or main section of the house has two layers. The back section appears to only have one. You’re gonna need a significant amount of plywood. I did sell 18 sheets and he is aware that we may need more. The facial work we are doing is the two dormers on the front of the house and the Gables on the front main section of house only. There is a section of facia on the right hand side of the house on the second floor on the back please inspect this to see if any additional repairs need to be made. The facia appears to be coming away from the house. He is aware that additional work may need to be done. For the welcome call if you call before 3 PM you will have to contact Melissa Parker at 410-845-4000 extension 6215. If it is after three, you can reach Donald on his cell at the number that’s on the account.
